what_it_does: A two-line README for the claude-design research directory. States the directory is the evidence base for the claude-design pack, and gives a precedence rule: where BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md covers the same seam/placement findings as the deep-reads here, the seam pack is the single source and the deep-reads must not be updated independently.
observations: Only one sentence of content (plus an implied second clause); extremely terse.
Names a sibling/related file BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md not in this batch.
Establishes a one-source precedence rule to prevent divergent updates between the seam pack and the deep-reads.
standouts: Encodes a conflict-resolution / one-source-of-truth rule in a README rather than just describing contents.
conventions: Follows the repo's one-source-of-truth discipline (avoid duplicate authoritative copies).
Lacks the frontmatter that the other inventory docs in this pack carry.
concerns: No frontmatter (type/register/status), unlike the inventory files in the same directory.
References BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md without a path, so the precedence target is unresolvable from this file alone.
notes: A two-line README declaring this directory the evidence base for claude-design and giving the precedence rule that BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md wins on shared seam/placement findings.
questions: Where does BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md live, and what exactly counts as a shared 'seam/placement finding'?
Why does this README lack the frontmatter the inventory docs use?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it is a README and it briefly orients the reader plus states a precedence rule, which is all it claims.
apparent_themes: Evidence-base framing for a design pack
intention_signals: To prevent two documents (the seam pack and these deep-reads) from drifting apart by declaring which one governs shared findings.
contribution: Contributes the precedence rule that BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md is the one source for shared seam/placement findings, and the framing of this directory as the claude-design evidence base — a coordination instruction a fused system would keep to avoid duplicate-authority drift.
summary_for_embedding: A two-line README declaring the claude-design research directory the evidence base for the pack and giving precedence to BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md over the deep-reads for shared seam/placement findings.
intention_for_embedding: To orient readers to the claude-design evidence base and stop the seam pack and deep-reads from drifting by naming which document governs overlapping findings.
